data.body: Gerrit change #670 created for d9aa (misty-creatable-mallard) — awaiting Verified/LLM-Review votes; will close d9aa after Verified +1. b228 closed (signed). Auto-lander bugs 0d3e/15a1/dc33 force-closed as obsoleted by ADR 0047/bcf0 (user-approved). Now investigating external-integration FM-3 (code-review-disabled vs pydantic_ai) + FM-4 (gate_source ungated in text-mode) with live LLM (user-approved).
